data.title: 国际服特殊调查「The Tree of Sephiroth」#3
data.summary: [Mini Event Notice] Special Investigation: The Tree of Sephiroth is back! Earn enhancement materials
data.body:
[Mini Event Notice]

Special Investigation: The Tree of Sephiroth is back!
Earn enhancement materials and a whole bunch of credits!
